title: CiviCRM
description: Open-source constituent relationship management for nonprofits and civic groups, handling contacts, contributions, events, memberships and email.
installation: Runs CiviCRM Standalone (civicrm/civicrm). Requires a MariaDB/MySQL database (the bundled mariadb addon, default db/user/password 'civicrm' — rotate before production). On first run the install script provisions the admin account from CIVICRM_ADMIN_USER / CIVICRM_ADMIN_PASS — rotate the password and rotate the DB password too. CIVICRM_UF_BASEURL is wired to the app URL token. CiviCRM does NOT support PostgreSQL. Persistent paths public/, private/ and ext/ are mounted as volumes; back these up. For outbound email and SMS configure an external SMTP provider from the CiviCRM admin UI after install.
